ValidationRule.description: The Invoice Receiver must have an UID.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $User.PS480FunctionValidationRulesActive__c =true, ISBLANK(InvoiceReceiver__r.UID__c), ISPICKVAL(InvoiceReceiver__r.BillingCountry__c ,"Switzerland"), OR( ISPICKVAL(InvoiceReceiver__r.LegalNature__c,"Corporation / Limited Company"), ISPICKVAL(InvoiceReceiver__r.LegalNature__c,"Limited Partnership") ), OR( ISPICKVAL(InvoiceStatus__c ,"Ready"), ISPICKVAL(InvoiceStatus__c ,"Sent") ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You can not set the Invoice to Ready / Sent. Reason: The Invoice Receiver Account has no UID information. Please open the Invoice Receiver Account in a new browser tab and get the UID Information from www.zefix.ch. (IN011)
